page: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 32 physical cores and 64 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The processor architecture includes a 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512). The system is equipped with 512 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per vCPU.

For local storage, the instance includes 3,800 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-speed, low-latency local data access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 30 Gbps. The combination of high-capacity DDR5 memory and direct-attached NVMe storage makes this instance class highly resource-dense, balancing memory capacity with fast local storage I/O.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance across memory-intensive and computational workloads. The instance achieved top-tier results in Geekbench multi-core testing and static web serving throughput, alongside strong performance in Passmark database operations and Redis SET operations. It also demonstrates high throughput in LLM inference prompt processing. These characteristics make the r8id.16xlarge highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise applications, and data analytics workloads requiring rapid access to large datasets.
description: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features a dedicated 64-vCPU Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor running at 3.9 GHz, supported by 512 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 3,800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The processor supports advanced instruction sets like Intel AMX and AVX-512, which contribute to its top-tier performance in Geekbench multi-core benchmarks, static web serving, and LLM inference prompt processing. It also delivers strong performance in database operations and memory bandwidth tests. This instance is optimized for memory-heavy applications, including large-scale databases, caching layers, and real-time data analytics.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 3,800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-performance database and caching workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, fast DDR5 memory, and high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 64 vCPUs and 3.9 GHz clock speed
512 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz
3,800 GB of low-latency local NVMe SSD instance storage
30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth powered by the Nitro hypervisor
Top-tier performance in database operations, web serving, and LLM prompt processing
